## Suggested Agent Workflow

- Claude Code assesses documentation impact and scope.
- Claude Code creates a Codex handoff task if implementation is needed.
- Codex updates docs only when handed off.
- CI provides feedback when documentation checks exist.
- Claude Code reviews locally after PR creation.
- Human approves and merges.
